title: 03.13.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: March 13, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: Weekly Reports: Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests

This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for March 6, 2026 through March 12, 2026.
The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.subcategory: Weekly Reports – Public Records, Media, Code Enforcement
fields.tldr: This memo transmits weekly activity reports to the Mayor and City Council for the period of March 6–12, 2026. It covers public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail individual requestors, request types, and categories across General, Police, and Fire records.
fields.key_stats: The partial log shown spans at least 65+ individual public records requests filed between March 6–7, 2026 alone, covering categories including Police Reports, Background Requests, Body Worn Camera Video, Fire Prevention Records, Building Plans/Permits, 911 Transcripts, Traffic Accidents, and Code Enforcement Violations. Multiple requests were submitted by recurring entities such as OPM (5 background requests on 3/6) and CRU LexisNexis (5 police reports on 3/6).
fields.action_items: No action items specified; memo is informational. Attachments A (Public Records), B (Media Requests), and C (Code Enforcement Service Requests) are referenced as supporting documents.

projects: Weekly Code Enforcement Services Requests Report
